revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''4-4-325

Calibrated variable phase advancer (in Shoran)

A device by means of which the transmitted pulse is shifted in time so that the received pulse will coincide with the marker pulse.

{{IALAFooter}}

{{languages|Shoran Calibrated variable phase advancer}}
